description_long: This is a vintage-style four-door sedan with a boxy, angular body painted in an off-white color with visible weathering and rust marks along the seams and edges. The car features a chrome front grille, round headlights, and a simple bumper, giving it a classic appearance. The windows are slightly tinted and the interior appears to have a patterned fabric upholstery. The wheels are small, with plain hubcaps and black tires, and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors. The rear of the car has rectangular taillights and a chrome bumper, with no visible license plate. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, mid-20th-century European or Japanese sedan.
description: A weathered, off-white vintage four-door sedan with chrome accents, round headlights, and simple hubcaps, showing signs of age and rust.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chrome grille, round headlights, and the boxy hood with visible rust along the seams.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door configuration, rust streaks along the body, and plain hubcaps on the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays rectangular taillights, a chrome bumper, and a large rear windshield with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the four doors, rust details, and the simple wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Plain steel wheels with simple, round, silver hubcaps and black tires; no visible spokes or decorative features.
